description: You are a backend developer resolving a blocked deployment. The team pushed a new Alembic database migration that crashes against the production SQLite database (Chinook). Fix the migration script at `/home/ga/workspace/media_db/alembic/versions/a1b2c3d4_update_schema.py` so that both `alembic upgrade head` and `alembic downgrade base` execute successfully. You can use `pytest test_migration.py` in the workspace to verify your fixes.
